title: Upgraded Elytra
description: Changes the texture of elytra to match the armor.
body:
# Upgraded Elytra **Hi!** This pack requires **OptiFine** to work and changes the texture of elytra to match the armor. If you want new texture you should rename Elytra to: - Netherite Elytra - Diamond Elytra - Gold Elytra - Iron Elytra - Chainmail Elytra - Leather Elytra This pack also has two versions: 1. thin 2. thick Check out images to see difference!
**Hope you like it!**
